description: Frontend scaffolding and core pages: Initialize Next.js 14 App Router with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, and implement the main pages (login, dashboard/feed, profile, showcase management, forum). Includes API client setup, auth hooks, and Docker configuration.
steps: Initialize Next.js 14 project in frontend/ with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, App Router, and src/ directory. Add dependencies: @tanstack/react-query, react-hook-form, zod, axios, lucide-react. Configure tailwind.config.ts and globals.css.
Set up shadcn/ui in frontend/: initialize with 'npx shadcn-ui@latest init', add core components (Button, Input, Card, Dialog, Badge, Avatar, Skeleton, Tabs, DropdownMenu, Toast).
Create frontend/src/lib/api.ts with axios client configured with baseURL (/api), request/response interceptors for auth token handling (attach Bearer token from cookie, handle 401 for refresh flow).

Create frontend/src/lib/auth.ts with auth utilities and frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts with authentication hooks (useSIAKADLogin, useGitHubCallback, useRefreshToken, useLogout) using @tanstack/react-query mutations.
Create frontend/src/app/layout.tsx root layout with QueryClientProvider, Toaster, and global styles. Create frontend/src/app/page.tsx as the public landing/feed page.

Create frontend/src/features/auth/ module: LoginPage component (NIM + password form with react-hook-form + zod validation), GitHubCallbackPage (handles OAuth redirect, exchanges code). Wire into frontend/src/app/login/page.tsx and frontend/src/app/auth/github/callback/page.tsx.

Create frontend/src/features/feed/ module: ActivityFeed component (infinite scroll with useInfiniteQuery, cursor-based pagination), ActivityCard component (displays event type icon, user alias/avatar, summary, timestamp). Wire into the main page.tsx.

Create frontend/src/features/profile/ module: PublicProfilePage (alias, bio, avatar, showcase repos, stats), ProfileEditForm (update alias/bio/avatar), IdentityBadge (shown only to faculty/admin). Wire into frontend/src/app/profiles/[alias]/page.tsx and frontend/src/app/settings/page.tsx.

Create frontend/src/features/showcase/ module: RepoSelector (fetches available repos, multi-select with academic tag dropdown), ShowcaseGrid (displays selected repos as cards with tags). Wire into frontend/src/app/showcase/page.tsx.

Create frontend/src/features/forum/ module: ThreadList (paginated threads for a repo), ThreadDetail (thread body + comments), CreateThreadForm, CreateCommentForm, NotificationBell (dropdown showing unread notifications). Wire into frontend/src/app/repos/[id]/discussions/page.tsx and frontend/src/app/repos/[id]/discussions/[threadId]/page.tsx.
Create frontend/src/types/ directory with TypeScript type definitions matching backend domain: user.ts, showcase.ts, activity.ts, forum.ts, auth.ts.

Create frontend/Dockerfile with multi-stage build: node:20-alpine builder (npm ci + npm run build), node:20-alpine runner (copy .next standalone output). Create frontend/next.config.js with output: 'standalone' for Docker.
Create frontend/.env.example with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.
acceptance_criteria: Running 'cd frontend && npm run build' completes without errors
Running 'cd frontend && npm run lint' passes
All page routes render without errors (login, feed, profiles, showcase, forum)
API client is configured with interceptors for auth token management
TypeScript types match backend domain models
Frontend Dockerfile builds a working image
findings: Build and lint pass successfully. Used Next.js 14.2.3. The useSearchParams hook requires wrapping in a Suspense boundary for static generation - separated the GitHub callback content into a sub-component. The img element warning in avatar.tsx is expected since we use arbitrary external URLs. All routes compile and generate correctly (static and dynamic).
